routes.notes: THE canonical V2 entry. No SWM_ env var switches the runtime itself — composition is env-gated only via SWM_CONSEQUENCES (default generated world) and SWM_ACTOR_POLICY (default hybrid qualitative). Legacy pipeline.simulate (pipeline.py:163) is a single-model compatibility helper, not public. Individual-reaction ensemble route: per-frame recon+critics then individual_reaction.py:simulate_individual_reaction:140 per surviving frame with FULL sample budget (structural_runtime.py:826-848), equal-weight mixture result :862-912.

routes.notes: No packaged CLI hits the V2 facade; pyproject.toml defines no [project.scripts].

default_runtime_summary: TODAY'S DEFAULT: facade.forecast(architecture='world_model_v2') -> unified_runtime.simulate_world -> structural_runtime.simulate_structural_ensemble (structural_mode='ensemble' is the only default; single-model is an explicit ablation). unified_runtime.py is the ORCHESTRATOR (per-plan phase helpers _apply_evidence_to_plan/_phase3_block/_condition_plan shared by both modes); structural_runtime.py is the DEFAULT DRIVER (Stage A recon -> shared evidence -> critics -> per-candidate Stage B compile_world -> dedup -> per-model conditioning+pilot -> promotion -> full budgets -> aggregation); the per-model terminal path is ALWAYS phase8_pipeline prepare/slice/finalize -> materialize (build_world, _bind_scenario_schema, operators_from_plan) -> rollout.WorldModelV2Run.run_particle_range -> temporal_runtime.run_branch_temporal (the event loop for EVERY branch) -> contract.project. generated_world.py is not a runtime but the default OPERATOR SET + kernel bound into every rollout because SWM_CONSEQUENCES defaults to 'generated_actor_mediated_world' (operators_from_plan materialize.py:229-277 appends GeneratedSemanticEventOperator/GeneratedObservationDelivery/GeneratedAttention/GeneratedActorInvocation/ScenarioPlanOperator/MechanismRuntimeOperator/ScheduledAttemptOperator). temporal_compiler.py runs once per structural model inside _condition_plan (cache key includes structural_model_id, temporal_compiler.py:250-253) and its ScenarioTemporalModel rides on the plan/world; temporal_runtime.py executes it per branch. Composition per structural model: own plan -> own posterior -> own temporal model -> own scenario schema/mechanisms -> own pilot+full particle slices through the ONE funnel; only the evidence bundle, the LLM call cache/ledger, and the CRN particle alignment (ScopedActorCache) are shared across models; exactly one promoted model commits the persistence checkpoint. Aggregation is per-model first (contract.project over branches), then cross-model equal-weight mixture + robust range + sensitivity classification in _assemble_ensemble_result. Answer readout: after event-time conversion the answer is F(deadline)/first-passage read from trajectories (EventTimeContract.project); otherwise frequency projection (OutcomeContract.project). No LLM is asked for a number after simulation.

llm_backends.budget_mechanism: none here — per-call max_tokens default 800 with per-call override (fn kwargs :30-39); budgets enforced downstream
llm_backends.retry: 5 attempts, deterministic backoff 1/2/4/8s on 429/500/502/503/504/URLError/timeout; non-transient 4xx raises immediately (:47-64)
llm_backends.notes: default_chat_fn:70 is THE standard selector: DeepSeek if DEEPSEEK_API_KEY else HF router else None. API key env-only; non-ASCII key fails loudly.
Also serves as the Tier-1 actor-decision fallback family when HF_TOKEN is set (materialize.py:_fallback_backends:339-350).

llm_backends.provider: HF router primary + DeepSeek direct fallback
llm_backends.budget_mechanism: on-disk content cache data/llm_cache (free re-runs); calls counter {cache,hf,deepseek,fail}
llm_backends.retry: retries=2 loop over both providers, sleep 1.5*(attempt+1); returns '' on total failure (fails open — callers must handle empty)
llm_backends.notes: Backtest/ablation harness backend, not the runtime default.

llm_backends.budget_mechanism: CallLedger:56 = ACCOUNTING ONLY (calls_by_stage/calls_by_model/cache hits/chars; total_calls:75) -> structural_ensemble.cost_manifest incl. single_model_equivalent_llm_calls + incremental_call_multiplier (structural_runtime.py:548-555,:592-599). No hard cap at ensemble level.
llm_backends.notes: CachedLLM:117 content-addressed exact-input reuse for deterministic ensemble stages; ScopedActorCache:157 cross-model CRN actor-decision sharing keyed (particle, prompt, occurrence).

llm_backends.budget_mechanism: QualitativeConfig.max_llm_calls = SWM_ACTOR_LLM_BUDGET default 240 per run across all branches/actors (:702-707); ENFORCED under lock in QualitativeDecisionEngine.decide (:757-760) and PRE-GATED by GeneratedActorInvocationOperator.budget_left -> temporally_truncated:actor_llm_budget_exhausted (generated_world.py:1233-1243). Per-branch invocation caps DEFAULT_BUDGETS (generated_world.py:60-61): 40 invocations/actor, 1000 semantic events, cascade depth 64 — exhaustion is a recorded temporal truncation, never a numeric fallback.
llm_backends.retry: primary retries=1 then each fallback family once; serving family recorded on the decision (:749-769)
llm_backends.notes: The main production LLM spend: per-particle actor cognition.

llm_backends.budget_mechanism: OrchestratorConfig:37 — max_claim_docs=16 LLM claim-extraction calls, max_requirements_retrieved=8, lookback 120d; verify_online off by default
llm_backends.notes: Shared bundle gathered once per ensemble.
V1 trait extraction/drafts; degrades to heuristics without credentials. NOT on the V2 path.

statuses: SIMULATION_STATUSES :24 = completed | completed_with_degradation | clarification_required | execution_failed | temporally_truncated

FAILURE_TAXONOMY :30 = runtime_exception | unresolved_reference | invalid_execution_plan | terminal_readout_unbindable | missing_required_operator | corrupt_evidence_artifact | unavailable_service | serialization_failure | parser_failure_after_retries | timeout
temporally_truncated when temporal_runtime.temporally_truncated :98-106 (support capped to exploratory, recommendation withheld note)
completed_with_degradation when any per-model degradation OR incomplete ensemble :561
limitations carry 'ensemble execution incomplete' :479-483 and 'structurally underidentified' :476-478

structural_ensemble.structural_sensitivity.classification = STRUCTURAL_SENSITIVITY_CLASSES (structural_contracts.py:69-75): structurally_stable | mildly_structurally_sensitive | materially_structurally_sensitive | structurally_underidentified | ensemble_execution_incomplete (thresholds 0.05/0.15 :81-84; classify_forecast_sensitivity :313; single survivor without convergence certificate => incomplete structural_runtime.py:450-452)

consequence_report.structurally_under_modeled stamped :240-249 (also materialize.run_from_plan :559-569) -> limitation + support cap via _surface_consequence_degradation:326; actor-policy degradation via _surface_actor_policy_degradation:311
recommendation_kind = action | policy | pareto | abstain | gather_information :215

abstention codes seen: invalid_contract, authority_unclear, prohibited_harm, no_substantive_actions, utility_underspecified (abstain.py:16-46), no_viable_action (api.py:214), ensemble_execution_incomplete (ensemble.py:105), structurally_sensitive_recommendation (ensemble.py:129,:139)
legacy abstain -> clarification_required or execution_failed(+taxonomy); as_dict emits _semantics='no_abstention_v2' mirror :161-168
TERM NOT FOUND in repo — the classification field is structural_ensemble.structural_sensitivity['classification'] plus phase13 recommendation_stability (ensemble.py:335)

aggregation_points: swm/world_model_v2/contracts.py:OutcomeContract.project:65 — frequency/quantile projection over weighted terminal branches; unresolved_share for out-of-option-space mass

swm/world_model_v2/event_time.py:EventTimeContract.project:233 — first-passage CDF/survival/quantiles/mode marginal; binary answer = F(deadline) polarity-mapped :263-271; categorical = absorbed_by marginal + none_of_the_options_by_horizon :272-286
swm/world_model_v2/qualitative_actor.py:aggregate_actor_decisions — counted per-actor action distributions attached via materialize.attach_actor_decision_distributions:353
swm/world_model_v2/pipeline.py:result_from_run:55 — final per-model contract assembly incl. calibration.decompose_uncertainty :78
branch_weight_locations: swm/world_model_v2/materialize.py:_run_with_hypotheses:583-592 — hypothesis strata weights: plan.structural_posterior (Phase 3) else compiler prior; realized mass :617-622
swm/world_model_v2/phase13/counterfactual.py:_assign_hypotheses:100 — same stratification by particle INDEX for matched arms
swm/world_model_v2/unified_runtime.py:_phase3_block:262-265 — plan.posterior_rate_particles + plan.structural_posterior written from the evidence posterior

swm/world_model_v2/materialize.py:_inject_posterior_rate:408 — posterior particles copied into resolve_outcome/institutional_decision/hazard_round payloads + first_passage calibration (run_from_plan + phase13 paths)
swm/world_model_v2/event_time.py:1422-1428 (calibration_base.posterior_rate_particles) consumed at :520/:709 — the posterior as per-particle target mass on the DEFAULT event-time path

swm/world_model_v2/structural_runtime.py — CROSS-MODEL weights DO NOT EXIST by design: equal_weight_mixture:602 labeled 'equal_weight_uncalibrated_structural_average' :533-539; per-model distributions + robust_range are primary; qualitative support classes (support_class per candidate) are never numerified (module docstring :23-25)
swm/world_model_v2/structural_contracts.py:decompose_uncertainty — between-model vs within-model split feeding uncertainty_decomposition
